description: Composition Blue denim two-buttoned waistcoat with shell made of 72% cotton, 26% polyester and 2% spandex, has two insert pockets on the front and one insert pocket on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron do not iron on decorations Add a spark to your boring formals or add a touch of sophistication to your casual dressing with this fabulous waistcoat from jealous 21. Pair it with a short skirt and heels for a glomourous look. Model Statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33&rdquo
